step_rationale: Catalase dysregulated in atherosclerosis; antioxidant enzyme controlling oxidative stress from retained, modified lipids.
mechanism: CAT dysregulation impairs hydrogen-peroxide clearance, allowing lipid-driven oxidative stress to amplify atherosclerotic lesion progression.

references.title: Enhancing Endothelial Function with Nutrient-Enriched Table Hen Eggs: A Randomized Study in Patients Recovering from Acute Coronary Syndrome.
Oxidized LDL induces a coordinated up-regulation of the glutathione and thioredoxin systems in human macrophages.
